qas.q: What is the maximum bulk of hair a Male Airmen is allowed to have?
qas.a: 1 1/4in regardless of length, AFI 36-2903; 3.1.2

qas.q: (T/F) Male Airmen are allowed to wear their mustache downward of the upper lip line and vertical extended past the corners of the mouth?
(T/F) Male Airmen are not allowed to wear beards for reasons other than medical or religious reasons?
What is the maximum bulk of hair a Female Airmen is allowed to have?
(T/F) Female Airmen are authorized to wear Locs, Braids, Twists, cornrows, micro-braids, and French Braids.
Airmen (regardless of gender) shall not have fingernails exceeding a length of Xin from the tip of the finger.
(T/F) Airmen are authorized not to wear Tattoos/Brands/Body Markings on the head, neck, tongue, lips, eyes, scalp, and face.
Describe where the US Lapel insignia shall be worn on the Class A Uniform.
qas.a: Halfway up the seam, resting on but not over it, the US Letters are parallel with the ground, AFI 36-2903; 4.5.2.1

qas.q: Describe where Ribbons should be worn on the Class A Uniform.
qas.a: Ribbons will be centered, resting on but not over, the edge of the pleated pocket on the wearers left, AFI 36-2903; 4.5.2.3

qas.q: Describe where Male Airmen wear the plastic name-tag on the Class A and B Uniforms.
qas.a: The name-tag will be centered, resting on but not over the edge of the pleated pocket on the wears right, AFI 36-2903; 4.6.1.1

qas.q: Describe where Female Airmen wear the plastic name-tag on the Class A and B Uniforms.
qas.a: The Name-tag will be centered, even within 1 1/2in higher or lower than the first exposed button to the wearers right, AFI 36-2903; 4.6.2.3

qas.q: Describe where Metallic Rank is worn on the ABU for GMC Cadets.
qas.a: GMC Cadets will center rank on the left and right collar with the long edge of the insignia parallel to and one inch from the long edge of the collar, AFROTC Supplement to the AFI 36-2903, 1.5.4.4.4.

qas.q: Describe where Metallic Rank is worn on the ABU for POC Cadets.
qas.a: POC Cadets will center rank on the left and right collar, one inch from the front of the collar with the silver strip(s) perpendicular to the front of the Collar, AFROTC Supplement to the AFI 36-2903, 1.5.4.4.4

qas.q: (T/F) Cadet Rank is not worn on the cold-weather parka, FDU, or flight jacket.
qas.a: True, AFROTC Supplement to the AFI 36-2903, 1.5.4.4.5

qas.q: What Color undershirt is authorized for wear with the ABU?
qas.a: Desert Sand (tan), short or long sleeve, AFI 36-2903, 5.1.3

qas.q: Effective 1 Sept 2020 Airmen will only be allowed to wear what color(s) socks with the OCP Uniform?
qas.a: DLA-issued Green socks or Coyote Brown socks, AFI 36-2903 5.2.11

qas.q: What Color thread must name tapes be in for wear on the OCP?
qas.a: Spice Brown, AFI 36-2903; 5.2.4

qas.q: (T/F) Moral Patches are authorized for wear on the OCP Uniform?
What are the maxim amount of patches authorized for wear on the right sleeve of the OCP Coat?
Effective 1 Sept 2020 Airmen will only be allowed to wear what color T-Shirt with the OCP Uniform?
qas.a: Coyote Brown (Tan 499), AFI 36-2903; 5.2.7

qas.q: (T/F) Watches may be worn in uniform if the band exceeds 1-inch in width
(T/F) Necklaces are authorized for wear in uniform.
qas.a: True, they will not be visible at anytime, AFI 36-2903; 7.3.1.5

qas.q: (T/F) Sunglasses are authorized for wear while in formation.
qas.a: False, unless for medical reasons and authorized by a commander, AFI 36-2903; 7.3.2.

qas.q: Describe when an Airmen is authorized to wear/use wired/less headphones.
qas.a: During travel on public transportation, while wearing the PTG during personal PT in the fitness center, on designated running areas unless prohibited by the Installation Commander, or when specially authorized for the execution of official duties, AFI 36-2903; 7.3.4.1

qas.q: (T/F) Airmen are not allowed to walk and use electronic media devices (phone, speaker, etc.) while in uniform, unless for official notifications or emergencies?
qas.a: True, Military customs and Courtesies take precedence while using a electronic device however, AFI 36-2903; 7.3.4.2

qas.q: Describe what color of backpacks are authorized for wear in the ABU and OCP Uniforms.
qas.a: ABU-patterned, olive drab, and Air Force Sage Green back packs may be worn with the ABU. OCP-patterned, Tan, and Coyote Brown may be worn with the OCP. Black may be worn with any pattern. AFI 36-2903;7.3.5.3

qas.q: (T/F) All boots must be between 8 to 10 inches in height when measured from the back of the heel to the top of the boot, and worn in the OCP.
qas.a: True, in addition Starting 1 Sept boots must be Coyote Brown, AFI 36-2903; 7.4.3.2

qas.q: (T/F) Airmen are authorized to push up, remove, or cut the sleeves of the optional long-sleeved PTG Shirt.
(T/F) Airmen are authorized to solid black, white, or dark blue form fitting sportswear under the both the PTG and optional PTG running shorts, regardless of length.
(T/F) Saluting due to rank recognition is not required when wearing the PTG.
qas.a: True however all other military customs and courtesies apply, AFI 36-2903; 8.1.13
